title: Eva x Kagome tomato juice campaigns
display_title: Eva x Kagome tomato juice campaigns
wikitext:
[]: Eva x Kagome tomato juice campaigns             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 24, 2015 2:29 pm I'm interested in the juice boxes. Thinking of asking my contact to get some juice and try to win some nifty swag for me. And the list of what can generate AT Fields just got longer. Evangelion's Spear of Longinus Pierces A Tomato in the Sky with Kagome Juice Collaboration Master glass craftsmen creating 500 handmade Spears of Longinus for Evangelion giveaway Campaign site PV This is almost as funny as the Japan Racing Association collab PV.

[]: Re: Drink Eva collab juice, try to win glassware & cutle             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Apr 24, 2015 8:20 pm AR-99 wrote: And the list of what can generate AT Fields just got longer.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 24, 2015 8:25 pm Guess I figured lots of EGFers are also on Twitter but either way tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 10, 2015 9:22 pm Someone's got some juice to buy. I'll ask if they can drink the juice to cut down on the shipping weight. ;) Update: 2nd campaign incoming. And I like where this is going. http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2015/07/28-1/the-second-tomato-impact-kagome-x-evangelion-collaboration There is also an official Twitter: https://twitter.com/kagome_eva

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Aug 11, 2015 5:12 am For the follow-up they should have replace the bakelite from The End of Evangelion with tomato juice, or better yet replace Lilith in Terminal Dogma with a tomato and have it drip its juice into boxes/bottles below.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:13 pm Something did top the AT Field projecting tomato: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8uz2kyBD1mQ
